text:
わー、ありがとう！
まさか本当に条件通りの物を
持ってきてくれるなんて！

これさえあれば
きっと厨房のコンロも元通り……
ううん、それ以上になってくれるはず！

厨房のコンロはまさに命の火。
あなたは厨房の命の恩人ね！

本当にありがとう！
なにかあったら次もよろしくね！

Wow, thank you so much!
I don't think you could have found a more
perfect match for what I was after!

This should help get our stove back to
normal... Better than normal, maybe!

The stove is the heart of any kitchen, so you
basically just saved the life of ours!

Thank you so much! I'll definitely be sure to
seek you out next time I need anything.
